name: zoom
description: Zoom plugin for connecting Codex to Zoom context and building Zoom integrations

interface.shortDescription: Use Zoom context and build Zoom integrations.
interface.longDescription: Zoom connects Codex to Zoom meeting context and helps engineers choose the right Zoom product surface, design implementation plans, run deterministic setup and debugging workflows, review integrations with focused agents, and build across Zoom APIs and SDKs inside Codex.
defaultPrompt: Search Zoom meeting context and plan a Zoom integration.
